name: KFC Style Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cabbage and carrots into small pieces about the size of rice kernels.
2. Combine sugar, salt, pepper, milk, mayonnaise, buttermilk, white vinegar, and lemon juice in a salad bowl.
3. Beat ingredients together until smooth.
4. Add cabbage and carrot pieces to the mixture and mix well.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. Serves 6 to 8.
